title: hymenoxys cabrerae
intro: Hymenoxys cabrerae, also known as the Cabrera's fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hymenoxys cabrerae include relief from pain, reduced fever, and improved digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
